name: mynode
postCreateCommand:
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y sqlite3 libsqlite3-dev && sudo npm install -g @fission-ai/openspec && npm install && mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/openspec" && printf '%s
' '{"featureFlags":{},"profile":"custom","delivery":"both","workflows":["propose","explore","new","continue","apply","ff","sync","archive","bulk-archive","verify","onboard"]}' > "$HOME/.config/openspec/config.json" && cd /workspaces/mynode/myproject && openspec update . && cd /workspaces/mynode && mkdir -p .github && rm -rf .github/prompts .github/skills && cp -r myproject/.github/prompts .github/ && cp -r myproject/.github/skills .github/ && for f in /workspaces/mynode/.github/prompts/opsx-*.prompt.md /workspaces/mynode/myproject/.github/prompts/opsx-*.prompt.md; do n=$(basename "$f" .prompt.md); a=${n/opsx-/opsx:}; if grep -q '^name:' "$f"; then sed -i "s|^name:.*$|name: \"$a\"|" "$f"; else sed -i "/^description:/a name: \"$a\"" "$f"; fi; done
